source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for compact English operations UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for tidepool monitoring labels, alert states, dense metrics, and multilingual command/search surfaces.
layout: Dense 8px warning-system grids, 8px-or-less radii, ring-outline focus states, sucker-dot texture rhythm, compact telemetry charts, and restrained tidepool shadows for repeated scanning.

prompts.label: Transparent blue ring octopus motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for a catalog design system
Primary request: Create only an isolated blue-ringed octopus, full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact blue-ringed octopus in a calm alert posture, ochre-gold skin with natural mottled speckles, small rounded mantle, eight curled arms visible, and distinct electric cyan-blue warning rings across mantle and arms. The subject should read as a precise natural motif source for a compact warning-system UI theme.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the mantle, arm tips, or any rings. Slight top-down three-quarter view, symmetrical enough for palette extraction.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves ochre skin texture, soft cephalopod folds, bright blue ring markings, and subtle wet-satin surface detail without casting a floor shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no rocks, no sand, no water, no tidepool background, no aquarium glass, no second animal, no cartoon mascot, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input image: use the visible transparent blue-ringed octopus motif as the source reference for palette, markings, texture, spacing mood, and interaction language.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Blue Ring Octopus", derived from the blue-ringed octopus motif: ochre-gold skin, dark umber mottling, electric cyan-blue rings, tiny sucker rhythm, compact tidepool warning posture.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition, designed as a 3840x2160 source image. Keep all text and UI labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Ring Octopus, Blue Ring Octopus, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Charts, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Design mood: compact warning system for tidepool monitoring, marine lab alerts, sensor triage, encounter reports, hazard status, sampling queues, and biosecurity checklists. Quiet, utilitarian, precise, scan-friendly, alert-aware product UI.
Palette: derive colors only from the motif: tidepool shell off-white, low-tide ink, electric blue ring, cyan halo, ochre skin, umber mottle, sucker pearl, brine mist, tidepool night. Use electric blue as primary action and ring/focus color, ochre as accent, umber as alert/destructive support, restrained contrast.
Typography: show English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance. Include short examples such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 潮だまり監視, 警戒, 状態, 検索.
Full component coverage: icon buttons, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dialog/popover, tooltip, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumbs, dashboard metric cards, timeline, progress, skeleton/loading, empty/error/success states.
Charts and data: include line chart, bar chart, donut chart, compact status heatmap, sparklines, KPI cards, and table data for tidepool observations. Use chart colors from electric blue, cyan halo, ochre skin, umber mottle, and tidepool night.
Tokens: show semantic token rows for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, muted, border, input, ring, chart colors, sidebar tokens. Include visible radius samples capped at 2px, 4px, 6px, 8px; spacing samples on an 8px grid; shadow samples that are low and tidepool-like.
Texture: include subtle octopus skin speckling, electric-ring outline motifs, sucker-dot rhythm, soft wet-satin highlights, and thin warning-ring dividers. Keep cards radius 8px or less.
Layout style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board, precise grid, professional design-system documentation, no nested cards, no oversized marketing hero, realistic app components on a calm light background.
Text constraints: use short readable labels; no long paragraphs; no random brand names; spell "Morphous Blue Ring Octopus" correctly.
Avoid: generic purple gradients, neon overload, decorative blobs, stock aquarium photos, cartoon mascot styling, unrelated saturated colors, cropped motif, illegible microtext, watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent blue-ringed octopus motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references.
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the "Morphous Blue Ring Octopus" design-system board. It must feel like the same compact tidepool warning system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the motif-derived roles and light-board structure: ochre-gold octopus skin, dark umber mottling, electric blue rings, cyan halo focus states, sucker-dot rhythm, compact warning system navigation, dashboard/data examples, forms, tables, command/search, status states, tokens, radius, spacing, shadows, texture, and generated assets.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition, designed as a 3840x2160 source image. Keep all text and UI labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Ring Octopus, Blue Ring Octopus, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Charts, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Design mood: compact warning system for tidepool monitoring, marine lab alerts, sensor triage, encounter reports, hazard status, sampling queues, and biosecurity checklists. Quiet, utilitarian, precise, scan-friendly, alert-aware product UI.
Dark palette: background from low-tide ink and tidepool night; foreground from tidepool shell and sucker pearl; primary from cyan halo/electric blue ring; accent from ochre skin; destructive/alert from umber mottle; muted surfaces from deep blue-black brine. Keep contrast accessible and restrained.
Typography: show English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance. Include short examples such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 潮だまり監視, 警戒, 状態, 検索.
Full component coverage: icon buttons, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dialog/popover, tooltip, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumbs, dashboard metric cards, timeline, progress, skeleton/loading, empty/error/success states.
Charts and data: include line chart, bar chart, donut chart, compact status heatmap, sparklines, KPI cards, and table data for tidepool observations. Use chart colors from electric blue, cyan halo, ochre skin, umber mottle, and sucker pearl.
Tokens: show semantic token rows for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, destructive, muted, border, input, ring, chart colors, sidebar tokens. Include visible radius samples capped at 2px, 4px, 6px, 8px; spacing samples on an 8px grid; shadow samples that are low and tidepool-like.
Texture: include subtle octopus skin speckling, electric-ring outline motifs, sucker-dot rhythm, soft wet-satin highlights, and thin warning-ring dividers. Keep cards radius 8px or less.
Layout style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board, precise grid, professional design-system documentation, no nested cards, no oversized marketing hero, realistic app components on a dark tidepool operations surface.
Text constraints: use short readable labels; no long paragraphs; no random brand names; spell "Morphous Blue Ring Octopus" correctly.
Avoid: generic purple gradients, neon overload, pure black-only background, decorative blobs, stock aquarium photos, cartoon mascot styling, unrelated saturated colors, cropped motif, illegible microtext, watermark.
